feed.title: U.S. Supreme Court — Orders of the Court (current Term)
feed.subtitle: Order List / miscellaneous-orders page for the current October Term (cert grants and denials, stays, and other orders), complementing fed-scotus-opinions' slip opinions. The two-digit {scotus_ot_term} placeholder is resolved automatically at build time (scripts/common.py: scotus_ot_term()), so no manual update is needed at the Term rollover. Client-updated table with no stable per-order list container, monitored by full-page fingerprint.

entry.title: Monitoring started: U.S. Supreme Court — Orders of the Court (current Term)
entry.content: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
